_doc: Offline / fake config for the config-flow visualizer. Same trick as arch-drift.local.json: fake_scripted provider returns a canned mermaid response, MERMAID_RENDERER=:canned returns a canned SVG. Runs end-to-end with no API key and no mmdc install — for verifying the pipeline shape, the snapshot output, and the gate/render flow. trace.capture includes 'cost' so future attacher use works without re-editing.

claude-haiku-4-5:
{"mermaid":"flowchart TD
  root[root config] --> pipeline
  root --> fixture
  pipeline --> nodes
  fixture --> nodes","notes":"Canned response for offline runs — the real model produces a richer diagram from the snapshot."}
